title: phegopteris heterosora
intro: Phegopteris heterosora, also known as the Japanese chain fern or autumn fern, is a type of deciduous fern native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and is also believed to have a positive effect on skin and respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Phegopteris heterosora is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions with other medications.
